summary: Base W9 — first post-deload week, shallow step-up greenlit by Sun 6/14 both-clean AM (Adj #89 resolves Adj #87). §4.C prescribes 35 min Mon / 4×8 min @ T Tue / 30 min Thu / 40 min + 6 strides Fri / 60 min long Sat + Hyp B PM; v4.3 cap ~20 mpw. Bumps queued: preacher 65 (Adj #83); holds-until-clean: lat 155 (Adj #80), pushdown 22.5/arm pain-gated (Adj #84). Knee watch — went bilateral DURING Sat's run; §11.D bar holds Phase C opt-ins parked. Lift schedule unchanged. Tennis elbow clock reset W8 Tue (Adj #75) — keep §10.A dailies.
